Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Continued To Nov-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Co-Executors to appear on November 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
